title: Astria - Dreambooth API
paragraphs: Create an AI photography service with your own style and unique fingerprint. Provide premium quality images to your audience.
Create social media applications and give your users the power of embedding themselves in the image.
Add new generative features to your service while preserving identity and similarity.
Monetize your pet store with AI-generated images of furry friends.
Change the background and match lighting to your product.
Add more detail to your images. Enhance your photographs.
Redecorate your room, or move from sketch to reality.

images.alt: Flux fine-tuning results for AI photoshoot.
Virtual try-on with Flux. Use garment reference images.
Generative image filters for artistic effects.
